name: py-inspect
description: Inspect Python module/class internals: list public attributes, print docstrings, call functions, or run extra code, all within an optional venv.

parameters.name: module_path
parameters.description: Python module or class path to inspect (e.g. limits, flask.Flask, limits.storage.MemoryStorage)

parameters.name: --dir=DIR
parameters.description: Working directory to cd into first

parameters.name: --venv=PATH
parameters.description: Path to venv activate script (default: venv/bin/activate)

parameters.name: --call=FUNC
parameters.description: Call a module-level function and print its result

parameters.name: --code=CODE
parameters.description: Additional Python code to run after import (receives obj as 'mod' and 'obj')

examples.expected: HEADERS class contents: LIMIT=3, REMAINING=2, RESET=1, RETRY_AFTER=4

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses 3+ separate venv-activate+python -c steps (dir, getattr, inspect) into one inspect call, saving 2+ steps per library exploration.
